mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id AS userId, student_no AS studentNo, college_id AS collegeId, major_id AS majorId, class_id AS classId, enroll_date AS enrollDate, graduate_date AS graduateDate, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM student WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT id, user_id AS userId, student_no AS studentNo, college_id AS collegeId, major_id AS majorId, class_id AS classId, enroll_date AS enrollDate, graduate_date AS graduateDate, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM student WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE student SET student_no = #{studentNo}, college_id = #{collegeId}, major_id = #{majorId}, class_id = #{classId}, enroll_date = #{enrollDate}, graduate_date = #{graduateDate} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT s.id AS studentId, s.user_id AS userId, s.student_no AS studentNo, s.college_id AS collegeId, c.college_name AS collegeName, s.major_id AS majorId, m.major_name AS majorName, s.class_id AS classId, cl.class_name AS className, cl.grade, up.name, up.gender, up.avatar, up.id_card AS idCard, s.enroll_date AS enrollDate, s.graduate_date AS graduateDate, s.create_time AS createTime, s.update_time AS updateTime FROM student s LEFT JOIN college c ON s.college_id = c.id LEFT JOIN major m ON s.major_id = m.id LEFT JOIN class cl ON s.class_id = cl.id LEFT JOIN user_profile up ON s.user_id = up.user_id WHERE s.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT s.id AS studentId, s.user_id AS userId, s.student_no AS studentNo, s.college_id AS collegeId, c.college_name AS collegeName, s.major_id AS majorId, m.major_name AS majorName, s.class_id AS classId, cl.class_name AS className, cl.grade, up.name, up.gender, up.avatar, up.id_card AS idCard, s.enroll_date AS enrollDate, s.graduate_date AS graduateDate, s.create_time AS createTime, s.update_time AS updateTime FROM student s LEFT JOIN college c ON s.college_id = c.id LEFT JOIN major m ON s.major_id = m.id LEFT JOIN class cl ON s.class_id = cl.id LEFT JOIN user_profile up ON s.user_id = up.user_id ORDER BY s.id ASC
